ddls:
CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "unlock_time" TEXT /* Time when the puzzle is unlocked for participants */,
  "solve_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to solve the puzzle */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses made by participants */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (1 to 5) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the puzzle (e.g., logic, word, math) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints provided with the puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant registered for the competition */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Participant's date of birth */,
  "location" TEXT /* Participant's location (city, country) */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the participant's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Participant's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant making the attempt */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being attempted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant started the puzzle */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant finished the puzzle */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses made in this attempt */,
  "is_abandoned" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the attempt was abandoned */,
  "hints_used" INTEGER /* Number of hints used during the attempt */,
  "attempt_device" TEXT /* Device used for the attempt (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the participant for this puzzle */,
  "solve_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to solve the puzzle */,
  "incorrect_guesses_leaderboard" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses for leaderboard ranking */,
  "total_points_leaderboard" INTEGER /* Total points for leaderboard ranking */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition for which the leaderboard is relevant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant profile */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the participant */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the participant's avatar image */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the participant */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the participant's social media profiles */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Categories of puzzles the participant prefers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_profiles_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender participant */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver participant */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time when the message was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the message has been read */,
  "parent_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent message for threading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who earned the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points value of the reward */,
  "earn_time" TEXT /* Time when the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, points, certificate) */,
  "is_redeemed" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the reward has been redeemed */,
  "redeem_time" TEXT /* Time when the reward was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle version */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the puzzle */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the version was updated */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_versions_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_tags_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the participant */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the review (moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_reviews_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_reviews_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "average_solve_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken to solve the puzzle */,
  "average_incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Average number of incorrect guesses */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made */,
  "average_hints_used" INTEGER /* Average number of hints used */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants who attempted the puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_statistics_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "average_solve_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken to solve puzzles */,
  "total_incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Total number of incorrect guesses across all puzzles */,
  "total_puzzles_solved" INTEGER /* Total number of puzzles solved */,
  "average_hints_used" INTEGER /* Average number of hints used */,
  "total_competitions_participated" INTEGER /* Total number of competitions the participant has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_statistics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
